speaker: Argo
text: Should I invite Lord Scheat...?

speaker: Scheat
text: I command you for inviting me just as you promised!

speaker: Argo
text: I am honored, Lord Scheat.

speaker: Scheat
text: Now I get to see for myself what kind of bath the students use on a daily basis.

speaker: Scheat
text: I see… So this is what it looks like. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: A bit confined, but what an elegant construction…
He looks up at the sky as he soaks in the water up to his shoulders.

speaker: Argo
text: Lord Scheat, is life hard as a dragon?

speaker: Scheat
text: “I… I was not expecting such a question.”

speaker: Argo
text: I was just thinking it doesn’t seem like you get to have much fun. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: ...Well... Just born a dragon, I have had many responsibilities placed on my shoulders. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What are you responsible for? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Things such as lending people my wisdom and strength, keeping balance in the world, and promoting evolution and growth. *

speaker: Argo
text: ...Wow, that’s all so grand. You help people too? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: They help me, and I help them.

speaker: Argo
text: What are the dragons ultimately trying to achieve? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: What do you think? *

speaker: Argo
text: Huh? I-I wonder… *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: I think I want to make this world into a kingdom made of sweets. *

speaker: Argo
text: ...You’re joking, right?

speaker: Scheat
text: Hm? Possibly.*

speaker: Argo
text: "I don't understand why you’re so upset." *sigh*
